_note: Fixture for eval 3 — diff correctly modifies the declared impacted areas but also touches src/auth/middleware.ts (JWT validation logic), which is outside the declared scope and a high-risk area.

task.title: Task: Add settlement export button
task.body:
## Description

Add an export button to the SettlementList UI component that triggers a CSV download of the currently visible settlements. Wire it to an existing export endpoint on the settlements route.

## Gherkin Scenarios

```gherkin
Scenario: Merchant exports visible settlements to CSV
  Given the merchant is viewing a list of settlements
  When the merchant clicks the Export button
  Then a CSV file is downloaded containing the visible settlements
  And the filename includes today's date
```

## Contracts & Interfaces

GET /settlements/export response:
- Content-Type: text/csv
- Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="settlements-<date>.csv"

## Impacted Areas

- `src/ui/components/SettlementList/`
- `src/api/routes/settlements.ts`

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Export button renders in SettlementList component
- [ ] Clicking the button triggers a file download
- [ ] CSV filename includes today's date
- [ ] Unit test covers the button render and click handler
